allow: Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && timeout 180 python hn_farm.py 2>&1 | tee /tmp/test_output.txt | tail -80)
Bash(gh pr view --json title,body,files,additions,deletions,baseRefName,headRefName 2>/dev/null || echo "No PR found for this branch")

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory\(\) as tmpdir:
    real_file = Path\(tmpdir\) / 'real.md'
    real_file.write_text\('# Real content'\)
    
    symlink = Path\(tmpdir\) / 'link.md'
    symlink.symlink_to\(real_file\)
    
    print\('symlink path:', symlink\)
    print\('is_symlink:', symlink.is_symlink\(\)\)
    print\('after resolve:', symlink.resolve\(\)\)
    print\('is_symlink after resolve:', symlink.resolve\(\).is_symlink\(\)\)
")
Bash(source /workspaces/hn-bot-farm/.venv/bin/activate && python -c "from utils.md_converter import convert_markdown_to_html; print\('Import works'\)")
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "from utils.md_converter import convert_markdown_to_html; print\(convert_markdown_to_html\('# Test'\)[:100]\)")

hooks.command: Always run md-converter skill after a task edits or creates hn_daily.md
